ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this component belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type this component belongs to */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the component */,
  "bindable" INTEGER /* Whether the component is bindable */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Whether the component is read-only */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the component is required */,
  "localizable" INTEGER /* Whether the component is localizable */,
  "editable_binding" INTEGER /* Whether the component has an editable binding */,
  "projectable" INTEGER /* Whether the component is projectable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date and time when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this permission relates to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Text of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)
